options.name: -ignoreMinWireLength
options.description: If reference wire length at a partition pin is less than min_wire_length, then it will not be reported in output file. Default: 60 microns

options.name: -outFile
options.description: pin QoR comparison will be output in this file. Default: ./qor_compare.txt

options.name: -reference
options.description: <pin_qor_reference_file_name> pin QoR reference file generated by reportPinAssignStatistics command.

options.name: -target
options.description: pin QoR target file generated by reportPinAssignStatistics command.
